passThreshold.label: COMPASS pass threshold
passThreshold.description: An Employment Pass application needs at least 40 COMPASS points.

smallFirmPmetThreshold.label: COMPASS small-firm PMET headcount threshold
smallFirmPmetThreshold.description: Firms with fewer than 25 PMET employees receive a neutral default score of 10 points on both C3 (diversity) and C4 (support for local employment).

smallFirmNeutralScore.label: COMPASS small-firm neutral C3/C4 score
smallFirmNeutralScore.description: The default neutral score awarded on both C3 (diversity) and C4 (support for local employment) for firms below the small-firm PMET headcount threshold.

facts.label: C1 salary scoring
facts.value: C1 compares fixed monthly salary with local PMET salaries by age and sector.

facts.label: C2 qualification scoring
facts.value: C2 awards points for recognised qualifications.

facts.label: C3 small-firm score
facts.value: Firms with fewer than 25 PMET employees receive 10 points by default for C3.

facts.label: C4 small-firm score
facts.value: Firms with fewer than 25 PMET employees receive 10 points by default for C4.

facts.label: C5 skills bonus
facts.value: A role on the Shortage Occupation List can receive a COMPASS skills bonus.

facts.label: C6 strategic economic priorities bonus
facts.value: Eligible firms can receive a COMPASS bonus for strategic economic priorities.

facts.label: Financial services salary context
facts.value: C1 salary scoring uses the candidate's sector and age context.

facts.label: Employment Pass minimum qualifying salary (financial services)
facts.value: S$6,200 per month for applicants aged 23 or below, rising progressively to S$11,800 per month for applicants aged 45 and above.

facts.label: Non-financial-services salary context
facts.value: C1 salary scoring uses the candidate's sector and age context.

facts.label: Employment Pass minimum qualifying salary (general sectors)
facts.value: S$5,600 per month for applicants aged 23 or below, rising progressively to S$10,700 per month for applicants aged 45 and above.
